welcome.title: Welcome to Watch Rudra
welcome.description: Let us show you around your new minimalist cinema experience. Form follows function.

search.title: Find Your Film
search.description: Search across 12k+ titles. Type your favorite movie or show here.

resume.title: Resume Watching
resume.description: Pick up right where you left off. Every frame saved.

live.title: Live Events
live.description: Join watch parties and live streams currently happening.

watchlist.title: Your Queue
watchlist.description: Save movies and episodes here to watch later.

downloads.title: Offline Vault
downloads.description: Watch movies anywhere, anytime. Access your offline downloads here.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Manage your account, preferences, and view your activity here.

serverTip.title: Pro Tip: Server Change
serverTip.description: Inside your profile, you can switch between Server 1, Server 2, and Server 3. They have different content libraries! If you can't find a movie or show on one server, try switching to another.

ready.title: You are ready
ready.description: Enjoy the pure cinematic experience. No distractions. Just film.

offline.title: You are Offline
offline.description: Watch Rudra requires a connection to explore. Go to your vault to watch downloaded titles.

swUpdate.title: New version available
swUpdate.description: Refresh to get the latest updates.

metadata.homeDescription: Search for movies and TV shows to start watching together.
metadata.continueWatchingDescription: Pick up where you left off with your recently watched movies and TV shows.
metadata.searchDescription: Search for movies, TV shows, and anime.
metadata.profileDescription: Manage your profile and viewing history.
metadata.liveDescription: Watch live sports matches and channels with your friends in real-time.
metadata.downloadsDescription: Access your downloaded movies and TV shows for offline viewing.
metadata.watchlistDescription: Keep track of movies and TV shows you want to watch later.
metadata.watchPartyDescription: Join your friends and watch together in real-time.
metadata.userProfileDescription: View {name}'s watch activity and profile on Watch Rudra.

desktopApp.notInstalledDesc: We could not open the Watch Rudra Desktop app. Is it installed?

whatsNew.title: What's New
whatsNew.description: Latest updates, bug fixes, and features for Watch Rudra.
whatsNew.noReleases: No releases found or failed to load.
